mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of James C.C., Mary E.A., and Loula D.D. Snead
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of James C.C., Mary E.A., and Loula D.D. Snead Robert O. Harvey, Guardian until he resigned 05.12.1903 Recorded in Ledger Book 5, Page 249, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
